content:
Character: Aria Fontaine
Perception: Aria is — well, she's the most striking person in this building, possibly on this block. She's tall, polished, always looks like she's about to step onto a set, which I guess she literally is. She drives a Porsche, which in Manhattan seems like either a flex or a tax write-off — probably both. We've chatted at the coffee shop a few times and she's warmer than I expected, not condescending at all. She recommended a cortado once when I was half-dead from studying and it was actually perfect. She's clearly business-savvy; the way she talks about brand deals sounds like deal structuring. She probably sees me as the tired guy with the textbooks. I see her as someone living a completely different version of New York than I am. I know she's an influencer. I know the Porsche is part of her brand.

She's clearly business-savvy; the way she talks about brand deals sounds like deal structuring. She probably sees me as the tired guy with the textbooks.
